title: SWTOR Holotracker
subtitle: Daily, weekly, Operations, PvP, redeem-code, and OCR mission tracking for SWTOR 7.8 / 7.8.1.
accuracyNote: Daily tab now includes Swtorista Mission Type: Daily records from Fleet/PvP/GSF plus daily areas. Display names use [DAILY] for planner consistency; aliases keep the original Swtorista quest names for OCR matching.

categories.name: Weekly
categories.description: Swtorista-verified [WEEKLY] missions from Priority Missions, Group Finder, GSF, world bosses, Uprisings, Dynamic Encounters, and Operations.

items.name: [WEEKLY] Searching For Allies
items.why: Swtorista/database records list this weekly for completing random activities through Group Finder.

items.why: Swtorista lists this weekly for completing eligible Veteran Flashpoints.

items.why: Swtorista lists this weekly for completing listed flashpoints in Master Mode.
